recommendations.title: A Million Miles Away
recommendations.overview: The life of engineer and former NASA astronaut José M. Hernández, the first migrant farmworker to go to space.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

recommendations.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
recommendations.overview: Archival material from the original NASA film footage – much of it seen for the first time – plus interviews with the surviving astronauts, including Jim Lovell, Dave Scott, John Young, Gene Cernan, Mike Collins, Buzz Aldrin, Alan Bean, Edgar Mitchel

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Money Shot: The Pornhub Story
recommendations.overview: Featuring interviews with performers, activists and past employees, this documentary offers a deep dive into the successes and scandals of Pornhub.

recommendations.title: Operation Avalanche
recommendations.overview: In 1967, four undercover CIA agents were sent to NASA posing as a documentary film crew. What they discovered led to one of the biggest conspiracies in American history.

recommendations.title: Hidden Figures
recommendations.overview: The untold story of Katherine G. Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson – brilliant African-American women working at NASA and serving as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history – the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit.

recommendations.title: Schumacher
recommendations.overview: Through exclusive interviews and archival footage, this documentary traces an intimate portrait of seven-time Formula 1 champion Michael Schumacher.
recommendations.director: Hanns-Bruno Kammertöns, Vanessa Nöcker, Michael Wech

recommendations.title: Apollo 18
recommendations.overview: Officially, Apollo 17 was the last manned mission to the moon. But a year later in 1973, three American astronauts were sent on a secret mission to the moon funded by the US Department of Defense. What you are about to see is the actual footage which

recommendations.title: Bikram: Yogi, Guru, Predator
recommendations.overview: The spectacular rise and scandalous fall of hot-yoga evangelist Bikram Choudhury is chronicled through archival footage and extensive insider interviews.
